heroHeadline: Read, edit and take your Markdown files back locally.
heroText: This web version focuses on quick single files: drag-and-drop import, a calm reading mode, raw text editing and export without a server.
surfaceReaderDesc: Good for mobile reviews, quick corrections and fast approvals.
surfaceWriterDesc: Markdown stays the leading source of truth. No hidden cloud copy.
footnote1: Currently supports direct Markdown files and cleanmarkdown-session-v1.json.
footnote2: Asset bundles and relative image paths remain as the next step so that web and desktop keep the same simple file model.
statusInitial: Local, offline-ready and free from cloud lock-in.
errorCannotRead: The file could not be read.
errorInvalidSession: The JSON file is not a valid CleanMarkdown session.
